projectDescription: A fake lottery ticket web game where players tap a single button to win randomized fake money, with confetti celebrations for big wins.
keyFeatures: Weighted random prize generator (rare large wins)
Running balance tracker with animated pop effect
Dark mode support via CSS media query
Reset button to clear balance and start over
Zero dependencies — pure HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript
Deployed as a static site via GitHub Pages
publicApiSurface: getRandomInt() — weighted random prize between $10 and $1000
'Try Your Luck' button click handler — generates prize and updates balance
Reset button click handler — resets balance and amount-won to 0
